name: Tf2 crew world of pokemon!
description:
Welcome to the world of Pokemon!

(Not tested)(Text start!)

Welcome to the world of pokémon- wait a moment isn't this Oak's line? why yes! this this the world of pokémon your an kid from the paldea region when you wondered to the Alola region to look at the pokémon and learn... About the lovely variants of the region

*but well you were walking down the mall you run into the infamous team rocket trying to steal pokemon again and you meet other people like ash and he's pikachu who you know from an other region running into him before and this team and their pokemon they call themselves the red team at least their helping while seeming on their vacation despite their chaotic nature*
